mapper.select: SELECT id, name, sort, use_count, status, delete_flag FROM osh_exam_tag WHERE name = #{name} AND delete_flag = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT et.name FROM osh_exam_tag_rel etr INNER JOIN osh_exam_tag et ON etr.tag_id = et.id AND et.delete_flag = 0 WHERE etr.exam_id = #{examId} AND etr.delete_flag = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO osh_exam_tag_rel (exam_id, tag_id, delete_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time) VALUES (#{examId}, #{tagId}, 0, #{createBy}, NOW(), #{updateBy}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT id, name, sort, use_count, status FROM osh_exam_tag WHERE status = 1 AND delete_flag = 0 ORDER BY use_count DESC, sort DESC LIMIT 50
